Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT up.upgrade, count(*) AS change FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.county = up.county AND bs.state = up.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 WHERE bs.applicability = true AND up.applicability = true AND up.upgrade != 0 AND (up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL OR bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL) AND (up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL OR bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL) AND (up."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL OR bs."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL) AND (up."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL OR bs."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL) AND (up."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL OR bs."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/629ce88f7ae51ebe9da57e46cd8838c5efe836856da9b804a44bd1c5c7ae2f6d/85715408-e554-488b-bbcd-5f30f961c19d/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
